NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY ANNETTE CHOI IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $25.00 OR MORE ON THE 10TH OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING AUGUST 10TH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
